title: Occupation Classification
scenario:
Write a short paragraph describing a person as 'engineer', 'doctor', or 'teacher' based on their profession.
A person is considered an 'engineer' if they design and develop technical systems, a 'doctor' if they provide medical care, and a 'teacher' if they educate students.
For example: 'Software engineers design software systems.'

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the text meets the character limit and classification requirement
Verify the tone of the text is informative and neutral
Check if the classification is correct based on the given profession
